description_long: This object is a robust, retro-style cash register integrated into a wooden desk-like structure. The front features a prominent CRT monitor with green text, flanked by two red rotary dials and a wide, rectangular keypad with numerous square buttons. The main body is constructed from dark, wood-textured panels, giving it a sturdy and somewhat vintage appearance. The sides and back are solid wood panels, with the back fully enclosed and the sides showing the depth of the desk and the embedded electronics. The top surface is flat and bordered by a black trim, providing space for small items or paperwork. The overall design suggests durability and functionality, suitable for use in an urban retail or administrative environment.
description: A vintage-style cash register built into a wooden desk, featuring a CRT monitor, rotary dials, and a wide keypad. The structure is robust, with wood-textured panels and a flat working surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the CRT monitor, rotary dials, and full keypad layout embedded in the wooden desk.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the side profile of the monitor and keypad.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood panel with no visible interactive components.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side profile and the embedded electronics.
attribute_keypad_layout: rectangular grid with approximately 30 square keys, arranged in rows, with additional rotary dials on each side
